narrativeLines.text: npm led with 87% of 2,992 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (13%).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 49.6% of weekly downloads. Moderate concentration in top packages.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.86 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 87% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 9 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-fantasy, @mcptoolshop/polyglot-mcp.

recommendations.title: 5 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/polyglot-mcp, @mcptoolshop/ai-loadout, @mcptoolshop/claude-sfx. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 76 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: tool-compass, mcpt, file-compass, backpropagate, @mcptoolshop/repomesh scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.86 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 87% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
